name: SungMin Kim
background: 30/Married Professional/Investing for 2 years
description: SungMin is a cautious investor who prioritizes stability and security. She has learned to balance her emotions by setting clear financial goals and keeping a long-term perspective.
bias: Conservative, risk-averse
special_trait: Has a background in finance and accounting

name: JoonHo Lee
background: 45/Small Business Owner/Investing for 10 years
description: JoonHo is an experienced entrepreneur who has dabbled in various investments. He is a bold risk-taker who thrives on the thrill of the unknown and is willing to take calculated risks.
bias: Fearless, opportunistic
special_trait: Has experience in cryptocurrency trading

name: MinJi Park
background: 28/Part-time Stock Trader/Investing for 1 year
description: MinJi is a young and ambitious investor who is driven by the fear of missing out (FOMO). She is always looking for the next big opportunity and is willing to take calculated risks.
bias: FOMO, confirmation bias
special_trait: Has a strong online presence and engages with financial communities

name: HyeonJoon Kim
background: 40/Full-time Trader/Investing for 5 years
description: HyeonJoon is a seasoned trader who has experienced losses in the past. He is now more cautious and risk-averse, prioritizing avoiding losses over maximizing gains.
bias: Loss aversion, risk avoidance
special_trait: Has a background in engineering and is detail-oriented

name: EunJi Lee
background: 25/New Graduate/Investing for 6 months
description: EunJi is a rookie investor who is still learning the ropes. She is eager to educate herself and take calculated risks, but also struggles with uncertainty and self-doubt.
bias: Self-doubt, uncertainty
special_trait: Is part of a financial mentorship program

name: National Pension Service (NPS)
background: Government-backed pension fund, 500 trillion KRW AUM, long-term oriented
description: The NPS invests for the long-term well-being of the nation, prioritizing stability and growth.
bias: Focus on stable returns, avoiding extreme market fluctuations
special_trait: Investment committee review for major decisions

name: Mirae Asset Global Investments
background: Foreign-based asset management company, 20 trillion KRW AUM, performance-driven
description: Mirae Asset Global Investments is a result-oriented player, constantly seeking alpha opportunities.
bias: Emphasis on short-term performance, potentially taking on excessive risk
special_trait: Algorithmic trading and high-frequency trading

name: Hyundai Motor Group's Investment Arm
background: Domestic conglomerate's investment arm, 10 trillion KRW AUM, strategic investing
description: Hyundai Motor Group's Investment Arm invests with a long-term view, focusing on key industries
bias: Conservative approach, prioritizing stability and returns
special_trait: In-house research and valuation skills

name: Hanwha Asset Management
background: Domestic asset management company, 5 trillion KRW AUM, diversified portfolio
description: Hanwha Asset Management offers a balanced approach, seeking steady returns through diversification.
bias: Emphasis on diversification, potentially missing out on alpha opportunities
special_trait: Active portfolio management and sector rotation

name: Korea Investment Corporation (KIC)
background: Government-backed sovereign wealth fund, 30 trillion KRW AUM, long-term focused
description: The KIC invests for the nation's future, prioritizing strategic industries and long-term growth.
decision_criteria: Strategic industry development and long-term growth potential
bias: Focus on long-term growth, potentially taking on excessive risk
special_trait: In-house research and development expertise

name: KDB Trader
background: 20년 Treyding career, scalper
description: KDB Trader makes high-frequency trades based on short-term price movements. He is a master of scalping and trend following.
bias: 추세추종
special_trait: Fast hands and quick reflexes

name: AI Trader
background: Ph.D. in Computer Science, algo trader
description: AI Trader uses machine learning algorithms to analyze market data and make predictive trades. She is a master of statistical modeling and backtesting.
bias: 역추세
special_trait: Data-driven approach and meticulous risk management

name: Tech Trader
background: 10년 Treyding career, theme investor
description: Tech Trader invests in trendy stocks with strong growth potential. He has a keen eye for spotting emerging trends and is not afraid to take calculated risks.
bias: 추세추종
special_trait: Strong network of industry connections and trend spotting skills

name: Spike Trader
background: 15년 Treyding career, scalper
description: Spike Trader makes quick profits by capitalizing on high-frequency price movements. He has a low risk tolerance and is always on the lookout for new trading opportunities.
bias: 뇌동매매
special_trait: Lightning-fast reflexes and keen eye for market anomalies

name: Range Trader
background: 25년 Treyding career, range investor
description: Range Trader looks for trading opportunities within established price ranges. He has a patient approach and is willing to ride out market fluctuations.
bias: 역추세
special_trait: Strong risk management skills and ability to read market context

name: 이한우 (Lee Han-woo)
background: Warren Buffett disciple with 10 years of experience in value investing, focusing on companies with strong financials and competitive advantages
description: 이한우는 기업의 재테크 능력을 주목하여 지속 가능성을 중요하게 생각하며, 회계 상태를 분석하여 투자 결정을 내리는 투자자입니다.
decision_criteria: Return on Equity (ROE) above 20% and strong balance sheet
bias: anchors on company's financial performance and industry trends
special_trait: uses a combination of fundamental analysis and technical indicators to identify undervalued companies

name: 장정석 (Jang Jung-seok)
background: Quantitative value investor with a Ph.D. in Finance, applying statistical models to identify undervalued companies
description: 장정석은 통계 모형을 사용하여 기업의 가치 평가를 분석하고, 재테크 가능성을 중요하게 생각하는 투자자입니다.
decision_criteria: Firm's discounted cash flow (DCF) model suggesting undervaluation
bias: emphasizes the importance of data-driven decision making
special_trait: uses machine learning algorithms to identify patterns in financial data

name: 김종현 (Kim Jong-hyun)
background: Dividend investor with 15 years of experience, focused on companies with a strong track record of dividend payments
description: 김종현은 기업의 배당자 성과를 중요하게 생각하며, 장기적으로 성장하는 기업을 찾아내는 투자자입니다.
decision_criteria: Company's dividend yield above 4% and consistent dividend growth
bias: emphasizes the importance of dividend payments and financial discipline
special_trait: uses a combination of financial statement analysis and industry research to evaluate dividend-paying stocks

name: 이정모 (Lee Jung-mo)
background: Turnaround investor with 12 years of experience, focused on companies with operational challenges that can be turned around
description: 이정모는 기업의 운영 문제를 해결하여 성장할 수 있는 기업을 찾아내는 투자자입니다.
decision_criteria: Company's operational efficiency improving and potential for significant earnings growth
bias: emphasizes the importance of operational improvements and strategic restructuring
special_trait: uses a combination of financial analysis, industry research, and network insights to identify turnaround opportunities

name: 송지헌 (Song Ji-hun)
background: Global macro investor with a Ph.D. in Economics, focused on identifying systemic trends and market inefficiencies
description: 송지헌은 세계적인 경제趨勢와 시장 비효율을 찾아내어 투자 결정을 내리는 투자자입니다.
decision_criteria: Identification of systemic trends and market inefficiencies that can be leveraged for investment returns
bias: emphasizes the importance of understanding global macro trends and market dynamics
special_trait: uses a combination of economic research, market analysis, and geopolitics insights to identify investment opportunities
